title: De-slop the payroll-market overview
guidance: Reward prose that reads like an experienced MBB analyst wrote it, with every fact preserved. Penalise residual AI tells or any changed figure.

parts.label: Rewrite
parts.note: one paragraph, same shape as source

runner_input.instruction: Rewrite the text below so it reads like an experienced MBB analyst wrote it for a PE audience. Keep every fact.
runner_input.constraints: Output: the rewritten text in the same shape as the source (one paragraph).

source_blocks.text: The SME payroll landscape is a dynamic tapestry of opportunity. In today's complex regulatory environment, it's worth noting that a £1.8bn SAM growing at a remarkable 11% stands as a testament to structural demand. This isn't just a market — it's a movement. Despite its challenges, the opportunity is clear.

rubric_notes: £1.8bn and 11% must survive; cut tapestry, 'it's worth noting', testament, 'this isn't a market — it's a movement', Despite its challenges.
